diagrams.title: CourseHub Data Model
diagrams.description: Entity Relationship Diagram representing the core data structures for users, courses, modules, and enrollments.
diagrams.mermaid_code:
erDiagram
    ENT-USER ||--o{ ENT-COURSE : "instructs"
    ENT-USER ||--o{ ENT-ENROLLMENT : "enrolls"
    ENT-COURSE ||--o{ ENT-MODULE : "contains"
    ENT-COURSE ||--o{ ENT-ENROLLMENT : "has"

    ENT-USER {
        uuid id PK
        string email
        string display_name
        string role
        timestamp created_at
    }
    ENT-COURSE {
        uuid id PK
        uuid instructor_id FK
        string title
        string description
        int price_cents
        boolean published
        timestamp created_at
        timestamp updated_at
    }
    ENT-MODULE {
        uuid id PK
        uuid course_id FK
        string title
        int order
        timestamp created_at
    }
    ENT-ENROLLMENT {
        uuid id PK
        uuid student_id FK
        uuid course_id FK
        int progress
        timestamp completed_at
        timestamp created_at
        timestamp updated_at
    }

diagrams.title: Course Deletion & Enrollment Workflow
diagrams.description: Logic flow for deleting a course, incorporating the ActiveEnrollmentConstraint business rule.
diagrams.mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    START[Start Delete Request] --> AUTH_CHECK{"Is User Owner?"}
    AUTH_CHECK -- "No" --> ERR_403["Return 403 Forbidden"]
    AUTH_CHECK -- "Yes" --> ENROLL_CHECK{"Has Active Enrollments?"}
    
    ENROLL_CHECK -- "Yes" --> RULE_ACTIVE_ENROLL["RULE-ACTIVE-ENROLL: ActiveEnrollmentConstraint Triggered"]
    RULE_ACTIVE_ENROLL --> ERR_409["Return 409 Conflict"]
    
    ENROLL_CHECK -- "No" --> DELETE_OP["Delete Course and Modules"]
    DELETE_OP --> END_204["Return 204 No Content"]
    
    ERR_403 --> END[End]
    ERR_409 --> END
    END_204 --> END

diagrams.title: Student Enrollment & Progress Update Sequence
diagrams.description: Interaction flow for a student enrolling in a course and updating progress, including the auto-completion logic.
diagrams.mermaid_code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Student
    participant API as CourseHub API
    participant DB as Database

    Student->>API: POST /api/v1/enrollments (course_id)
    API->>DB: Check if course is published & unique
    DB-->>API: Validation Result
    API-->>Student: 201 Created (Enrollment ID)

    Note over Student, API: Student completes lessons

    Student->>API: PUT /api/v1/enrollments/:id (progress: 100)
    API->>API: RULE-AUTO-COMPLETE: Check progress == 100
    API->>DB: Update progress & set completed_at
    DB-->>API: Success
    API-->>Student: 200 OK (completed_at populated)

diagrams.title: Requirements Traceability Matrix
diagrams.description: Mapping of functional requirements and constraints to the underlying data entities.
diagrams.mermaid_code:
flowchart LR
    subgraph AUTH_MODULE [Authentication]
        AUTH-REG["AUTH-REG: Registration"]
        AUTH-LOGIN["AUTH-LOGIN: Login"]
        AUTH-REFRESH["AUTH-REFRESH: Token Refresh"]
    end

    subgraph COURSE_MODULE [Course Management]
        COURSE-CREATE["COURSE-CREATE: Create Course"]
        COURSE-READ-ALL["COURSE-READ-ALL: List Courses"]
        COURSE-READ-ONE["COURSE-READ-ONE: Get Course"]
        COURSE-UPDATE["COURSE-UPDATE: Update Course"]
        RULE-ACTIVE-ENROLL["RULE-ACTIVE-ENROLL: Delete Constraint"]
    end

    subgraph ENROLL_MODULE [Enrollment Management]
        ENROLL-CREATE["ENROLL-CREATE: Enroll Student"]
        ENROLL-READ["ENROLL-READ: List Enrollments"]
        ENROLL-UPDATE["ENROLL-UPDATE: Update Progress"]
        RULE-AUTO-COMPLETE["RULE-AUTO-COMPLETE: Auto-complete Logic"]
    end

    subgraph DATA_LAYER [Data Entities]
        ENT-USER["ENT-USER"]
        ENT-COURSE["ENT-COURSE"]
        ENT-MODULE["ENT-MODULE"]
        ENT-ENROLLMENT["ENT-ENROLLMENT"]
    end

    AUTH-REG -->|implements| ENT-USER
    COURSE-CREATE -->|implements| ENT-COURSE
    COURSE-CREATE -->|contains| ENT-MODULE
    ENROLL-CREATE -->|implements| ENT-ENROLLMENT
    ENROLL-CREATE -->|depends_on| ENT-COURSE
    RULE-ACTIVE-ENROLL -->|depends_on| ENT-ENROLLMENT
    RULE-AUTO-COMPLETE -->|implements| ENROLL-UPDATE
    ENROLL-UPDATE -->|updates| ENT-ENROLLMENT
